title: Resource-constrained review queue prioritization
prompt: A trust-and-safety team can manually inspect only 200 flagged items during a shift. Before true violations are learned, the manager selects which flags to review using risk scores and expected harm. Unreviewed flags remain online. Frame scarce review attention without assuming perfect risk ranking.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: maximize expected prevented harm from reviewed items
model_specification.mechanism: Selecting an item reveals its status and enables removal if violating; unselected items receive no intervention.

fidelity_requirements: True status is unknown at selection
prohibited_inferences: The manager knows which flags are violations
